case_title: JONATHAN MACK VS. ELIZABETH CAMACHO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,995.00 FILED BY MACK, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELIZABETH CAMACHO, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-24-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ELIZABETH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-24-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, JORGE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-30-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PRESENT. CORINA BRYSON DE CALVO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
